items.title: Final: Storm 82, Sparks 64. Los Angeles shot 8-for-33 (24%) in the second half. They had 19 turnovers for the game. In truth, they looked like a rusty team coming off eight days off. Sparks are 8-11. They play on Wednesday at home against Indiana.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Storm 82, Sparks 64. Los Angeles shot 8-for-33 (24%) in the second half. They had 19 turnovers for the game. In truth, they looked like a rusty team coming off eight days off. Sparks are 8-11. They play on Wednesday at home against Indiana.

items.title: July 6, 1996: The U.S. men's Olympic basketball team erases a 17-point halftime deficit against a USA Select Team during an exhibition game at the Palace of Auburn Hills.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 6, 1996: The U.S. men's Olympic basketball team erases a 17-point halftime deficit against a USA Select Team during an exhibition game at the Palace of Auburn Hills.

Scottie Pippen scored 17 PTS and Hakeem Olajuwon added 16 PTS in the debut of "Dream Team III," a 96-90 win.

items.title: A handful of people asked why the big Nets-Hornets-Bulls-Wolves trade hasn't gone official yet...
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
A handful of people asked why the big Nets-Hornets-Bulls-Wolves trade hasn't gone official yet...

That deal will have to wait until July 9. Mouhamadou Gueye, who the Bulls are trading as part of the deal, isn't eligible to be traded until July 9 because he was signed on April 9.

items.title: In 1981, the Blue Jays went 32 innings without scoring.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
In 1981, the Blue Jays went 32 innings without scoring.

In 2008, they did a 31-inning streak. They've done 30+ four times in franchise history.

H/T @snstats.bsky.social
